info.title: ncbeauty
info.description: Move a .NET Core app runtime components and dependencies into a sub-directory and make it beauty.

options.name: -force
options.description: disable beauty checking and force beauty again.

options.name: -gitcdn
options.description:
specify a HostFXRPatcher mirror repo if you have troble in connecting github.
RECOMMEND https://gitee.com/liesauer/HostFXRPatcher for mainland china users.

options.name: -gittree
options.description:
specify to a valid git branch or any bits commit hash(up to 40) to grab the specific artifacts and won't get updates any more.
default is master, means that you always use the latest artifacts.
NOTE: please provide as longer commit hash as you can, otherwise it may can not be determined as a valid unique commit hash.

options.name: -hiddens
options.description: dlls that end users never needed, so hide them.

options.name: -loglevel
options.description:
log level. valid values: Error/Detail/Info
Error: Log errors only.
Detail: Log useful infos.
Info: Log everything.
(default "Error")

options.name: -noflag
options.description: do not generate NetCoreBeauty flag file.

options.name: -nopatch
options.description:
disable hostfxr patch.
DO NOT DISABLE!!!
hostfxr patch fixes https://github.com/nulastudio/NetCoreBeauty/issues/1

options.name: -roll-forward
options.description:
override default roll-forward behavior, see https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/versions/selection#control-roll-forward-behavior for more details.
Setting GitCDN
ncbeauty [--loglevel=(Error|Detail|Info)] setcdn <gitcdn>
set current default git cdn, can be override by --gitcdn.
ncbeauty [--loglevel=(Error|Detail|Info)] getcdn
print current default git cdn.
ncbeauty [--loglevel=(Error|Detail|Info)] delcdn
remove current default git cdn, after removed, use --gitcdn to specify.

arguments.name: EXCLUDES
arguments.description: dlls that no need to be moved, multi-dlls separated with ";". Example: dll1.dll;lib*;...

arguments.name: EXCLUDES
arguments.description: dlls that no need to be moved, multi-dlls separated with ";". Example: dll1.dll;lib*;...
